diagrams.title: CBC Mode Encryption
diagrams.description: Shows how each plaintext block is XORed with previous ciphertext block before encryption
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how CBC mode chains blocks for security

diagrams.title: CBC Mode Decryption
diagrams.description: Shows the decryption process reversing the CBC encryption
diagrams.purpose: Understanding decryption and error propagation in CBC

diagrams.title: ECB vs CBC Comparison
diagrams.description: Visual comparison showing how ECB reveals patterns while CBC hides them
elements: Same image encrypted in ECB mode (patterns visible)
Same image encrypted in CBC mode (random noise)
Demonstrates why ECB is insecure for images
diagrams.purpose: Visual demonstration of why ECB mode is insecure

diagrams.title: AES Round Structure
diagrams.description: Shows one round of AES encryption with four transformations
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the internal structure of AES rounds

diagrams.title: Key Distribution Problem
diagrams.description: Shows the challenge of sharing symmetric keys over insecure channels
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the fundamental key management challenge
